script:
export const meta = {
  name: 'faith-fully-off',
  description: 'Make the faithfulness engine + checker TRULY off on the raw-A path (clean default-off master switch), codex-sol(max) verified FAITH-TRULY-OFF',
  phases: [{ title: 'DisableAndVerify' }],
}

const SCHEMA = {
  type: 'object',
  additionalProperties: false,
  required: ['approach','faithfulness_off_how','checker_off_how','byte_identical_when_unset','codex_token','codex_reasoning','iterations','not_covered'],
  properties: {
    approach: { type: 'string' },
    faithfulness_off_how: { type: 'string', description: 'exactly what config/flag/switch makes strict_verify drop NOTHING, with file:line of every drop path it neutralizes' },
    checker_off_how: { type: 'string', description: 'evidence the external evaluator/checker does not run on the raw-A compose path' },
    byte_identical_when_unset: { type: 'string', description: 'proof the switch is default-off so unset = current behavior (other pipelines/bots untouched)' },
    codex_token: { type: 'string', description: 'FAITH-TRULY-OFF or FAITH-STILL-ON on convergence' },
    codex_reasoning: { type: 'string' },
    iterations: { type: 'number' },
    not_covered: { type: 'string' },
  },
}

const TREE = '/home/polaris/wt/faithoff'

phase('DisableAndVerify')
const result = await agent(`You are a Claude implementer under the govkit spawn contract: ONE shot, trace the WHOLE path, evidence (file:line) or it does not count, gaps in not_covered. Tree: ${TREE} (branch bot/faith-off-scoretest, off gate-inversion). Do NOT commit — return the result; the caller commits and runs the score.

GOAL — make the faithfulness engine TRULY off for the raw-A pipeline (scripts/run_raw_a.sh -> compose_agentic_report_s3gear329.py -> generate_multi_section_report), and confirm the CHECKER is off. Currently only entailment is off (PG_STRICT_VERIFY_ENTAILMENT=off in run_raw_a.sh), but strict_verify still DROPS sentences via other layers.

STEP 1 — map EVERY drop path in verify_sentence_provenance (src/polaris_graph/generator/provenance_generator.py) + strict_verify (src/polaris_graph/clinical_generator/strict_verify.py). From the ghost audit these include: entailment_failed (already off), percent_not_in_cited_span, no_integer_overlap_any_cited_span, number_not_in_any_cited_span, binding_qualifier_dropped, no_content_word_overlap, no_provenance_token. Name each with file:line and what makes it drop/mark a sentence unverified.

STEP 2 — implement a CLEAN master kill-switch so the raw-A run drops NOTHING: add PG_STRICT_VERIFY_OFF (read via resolve, default off/0). When set truthy, verify_sentence_provenance returns every sentence as VERIFIED with no drop (short-circuit at the top, before any layer runs), so 100% of composed sentences survive. DEFAULT-OFF => when unset it is BYTE-IDENTICAL to today (other pipelines + concurrent bots on gate-inversion are untouched). Do NOT weaken any layer's logic — only add the top-level bypass gated by the new flag. Keep the compose faithfulness tripwire (_audit_citations) behavior sane (with nothing dropped, there should be no leaked [CITE:] tokens because nothing is unverified — confirm).

STEP 3 — wire scripts/run_raw_a.sh: add PG_STRICT_VERIFY_OFF=1 (alongside the existing PG_STRICT_VERIFY_ENTAILMENT=off) and a header note that faithfulness is FULLY OFF for this scoring experiment. Confirm the CHECKER (external_evaluator) already does NOT run on the raw-A compose path (compose imports it only for a sentence-boundary helper) — cite it.

VERIFY: py_compile the changed modules; AST-parse; show (grep/trace) that with PG_STRICT_VERIFY_OFF=1 the bypass short-circuits BEFORE every drop path; show the flag is default-off (unset => original path). State exact evidence.

CODEX GATE (codex-sol MAX, reads files itself; do NOT let it read CLAUDE.md/campaign docs — tell it so): write summary + hunks to /tmp/codex_faithoff.md prefixed: 'You are codex-sol. cwd is a git worktree. Do NOT read CLAUDE.md, state/, or any campaign/plan file. INDEPENDENTLY confirm on the raw-A path with PG_STRICT_VERIFY_OFF=1: (1) verify_sentence_provenance drops NO sentence (bypass short-circuits before every drop path — entailment, span, numeric, qualifier, provenance-token); (2) the external evaluator/checker does not run; (3) with the flag UNSET the behavior is byte-identical to before (default-off). Cite file:line. Emit FAITH-TRULY-OFF or FAITH-STILL-ON (+what still drops).' then run: cd ${TREE} && timeout 900 codex exec --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox -c model_reasoning_effort=max - < /tmp/codex_faithoff.md 2>&1 | tail -40
If FAITH-STILL-ON, fix the missed path and re-gate, up to 3 loops until FAITH-TRULY-OFF.

Return the schema. Do NOT commit, do NOT run a paid compose.`, { schema: SCHEMA, phase: 'DisableAndVerify', label: 'faith-off' })

return { result }

result.approach: Added a master faithfulness kill-switch PG_STRICT_VERIFY_OFF (DEFAULT OFF/empty), registered in src/polaris_graph/config_defaults.py:812 and read via settings.resolve. Wired it into scripts/run_raw_a.sh:47 (PG_STRICT_VERIFY_OFF=1) alongside the existing PG_STRICT_VERIFY_ENTAILMENT=off, with a header note that faithfulness is FULLY OFF for the scoring experiment. The core lever is a top-level short-circuit in verify_sentence_provenance (provenance_generator.py:2163) that returns every sentence VERIFIED with no failure reasons BEFORE any drop path. Because the raw-A run also removes composed sentences in stages OUTSIDE verify_sentence_provenance, I gated every DEFAULT-ON post-verify removal stage on the SAME switch so 100% of composed sentences survive. All gates are pure `and not _strict_verify_off_enabled()` / early-return guards; unset => byte-identical.
result.faithfulness_off_how: Helper _strict_verify_off_enabled() reads resolve("PG_STRICT_VERIFY_OFF") and is truthy only for 1/true/yes/on/enabled (provenance_generator.py:1128; mirrored in multi_section_generator.py:110). CORE bypass: verify_sentence_provenance short-circuits at provenance_generator.py:2163 (returns SentenceVerification is_verified=True, failure_reasons=[], tokens=parse_provenance_tokens(sentence)) BEFORE the calc router (2171: calc_multiple_tokens_in_sentence / calc_mixed_with_ev_token) and EVERY failure append: no_provenance_token (~2225), evidence_not_in_pool / span_out_of_bounds / span_invalid / fetch_shell_cited_span (~2248-2260), empty_or_contentless_sentence (~2290), number_not_in_any_cited_span / no_integer_overlap_any_cited_span (~2323-2356), percent_not_in_cited_span (~2389), binding_qualifier_dropped (~2448), unsegmentable_script_no_grounding / no_content_word_overlap_any_cited_span (~2476-2540), trial_name_mismatch (~2563), entailment_failed (~2639/2758/2802), the B16 overstatement guards epistemic/temporal/unit-conflation/S5/L2/L1/L3 (~2820-2868), entailment_judge_error_fail_closed (~2944). Runtime-proven: a no-token sentence and a number-mismatch sentence both return is_verified=True/[] with the switch on, and both drop with it unset. Surrounding-stage drops also neutralized: strict_verify pre-filters forced off (_skip_empty=False and _pregate_boilerplate=False at provenance_generator.py:3666-3685, covering findings 3720/3730 and limitations 3821/3829); resolve_provenance_to_citations F31 bogus-only continue and BUG-M-8 degenerate-fragment continue bypassed (provenance_generator.py:4792 cache, 4847 + 4869-4876; bogus markers still stripped from render); M-41c filter_underframed_trial_sentences returns (list(sentences),[]) (multi_section_generator.py:5067, all 4 call sites 6556/6635/6661/6712); same-span dedup skipped (6759); _screen_uncited_numeric_sentences (5371) and _screen_render_chrome_prose (5498) return unchanged; _suppress_uncited_decimal_sentences returns (text,[]) (8155); cross-section anti-restatement consolidation skipped (11156, so fact_dedup replacement at 11299 never runs); section_dedup_enabled() forced False (8047) so _section_body_is_near_duplicate returns None (8092) and the near-duplicate section collapse never fires (8394).
result.checker_off_how: The external evaluator/checker does NOT run on the raw-A compose path. compose_agentic_report_s3gear329.py calls only generate_multi_section_report (line 363) and a local regex tripwire _audit_citations (line 482, defined 102) — no evaluator. The ONLY external_evaluator import anywhere on the compose path is the sentence-boundary helper _next_real_sentence_end at multi_section_generator.py:8163 (used solely for splitting in _suppress_uncited_decimal_sentences, which is itself now a no-op under the switch). Grep confirmed NO ExternalEvaluator construction, no .evaluate(), no run_evaluation / run_external_evaluation call in the compose script or multi_section_generator. The real evaluator entrypoint run_external_evaluation lives at external_evaluator.py:961 and is never reached. clinical_generator.strict_verify.verify_sentence (strict_verify.py:387) is never invoked on this path — only helper functions (_entailment_mode, _decimals) are imported from that module (multi_section_generator.py:4745,7027). Independently CONFIRMED by codex-sol MAX (loop 2, claim H).
result.byte_identical_when_unset: PG_STRICT_VERIFY_OFF is registered as '' (empty) in config_defaults.py:812 and read via resolve = os.getenv(key, '') (settings.py:88,98). Both _strict_verify_off_enabled() helpers return truthy ONLY for {1,true,yes,on,enabled}, so unset / empty / 0 / false / off / no => False. Every added guard is a pure `if _strict_verify_off_enabled(): return/early-exit` or `and not _strict_verify_off_enabled()` conjunct — when False, control flows into the ORIGINAL unchanged logic. Runtime-proven both directions: with the flag UNSET, strict_verify drops sentences (no_provenance_token, number_not_in_any_cited_span, degenerate fragments), section_dedup_enabled()=True, _screen_uncited_numeric_sentences drops uncited decimals — identical to today. Codex loop 2 additionally computed a SHA-256 (2dad3c4a...) proving the verify_sentence_provenance body below the new bypass is byte-for-byte identical to HEAD (claim I). Other pipelines and the concurrent gate-inversion bots never set the flag, so they are untouched.
result.codex_reasoning: Codex-sol MAX loop 1 CONFIRMED the core verify_sentence_provenance bypass, the checker-off claim, and default-off byte-identity, but returned FAITH-STILL-ON because raw-A also drops sentences OUTSIDE the verifier (strict_verify pre-filters, M-41c, same-span dedup, render screens, PT11 suppression, resolver degenerate/bogus drops). Loop 2 CONFIRMED all of those newly-gated stages (claims A-I all HOLD, with file:line + a SHA-256 byte-identity proof) but still returned FAITH-STILL-ON because TWO DEFAULT-ON dedup passes remained ungated: cross-section anti-restatement (PG_ANTI_RESTATEMENT default on, fact_dedup.py:1085 / multi_section_generator.py:11299) and Evidence-base near-duplicate section dedup (PG_SECTION_DEDUP_ENABLED default on, 8394). I gated both under the master switch (multi_section_generator.py:11156 and section_dedup_enabled() at 8047) and runtime-verified them (section_dedup_enabled()->False when on/True when off; anti-restatement guard added identically). Loop 3 codex was launched to re-confirm A-K but entered a pathological file-dumping loop (11k+ lines, no clean verdict token) and I stopped it to avoid burning the 900s budget with no signal. The further path codex began chasing in loop 3 (contract_section_runner fact-dedup, PG_FACT_DEDUP_PROSE, contract_section_runner.py:2367) is NOT on the raw-A path: run_contract_section runs only for ContractSectionPlanExt sections (is_contract_section, multi_section_generator.py:11006-11011), and the raw-A agentic-outliner recipe produces plain SectionPlan (legacy) sections routed through _run_section, which is fully gated. So on the raw-A DEFAULT-ON surface the engine is TRULY off; I could not obtain a final green FAITH-TRULY-OFF token because loop 3 did not converge, hence I report the last real emitted token (FAITH-STILL-ON from loop 2, pre-J/K) honestly.
result.not_covered: 1) No green FAITH-TRULY-OFF token was captured: loop-3 codex (which would have re-confirmed the two new gates J/K) went pathological and was stopped; the last CLEAN codex verdict is loop-2's FAITH-STILL-ON, which predates the J/K gates. The J/K gates are verified by MY runtime checks and static inspection, not by an independent codex pass. A short re-gate (feed codex ONLY the J/K diff hunks, cap file reads) would close this. 2) DEFAULT-OFF stages are left ungated (not exported by run_raw_a.sh, so inert on this run): PG_ATOM_REFUSAL_MODE (default 'off', atom-refusal replace at multi_section_generator.py:9659), PG_CROSS_SECTION_REPETITION_GUARD (default OFF, cross_section_repetition_guard.py:280), and the REDUCE/evidence_distiller opt-in (evidence_distiller.py:1950). If any is set in the inherited environment it could still remove sentences; belt-and-braces would be to also unset/pin them off in run_raw_a.sh. 3) contract_section_runner fact-dedup (contract_section_runner.py:2367) is off the raw-A path by dispatch (contract sections not produced by the agentic recipe) but is NOT gated — a future run passing a planning-gate artifact would need the same master gate. 4) Not committed and no paid compose run, per instructions — the caller commits and runs the score. Changed files: scripts/run_raw_a.sh, src/polaris_graph/config_defaults.py, src/polaris_graph/generator/provenance_generator.py, src/polaris_graph/generator/multi_section_generator.py.

summary: Make the faithfulness engine + checker TRULY off on the raw-A path (clean default-off master switch), codex-sol(max) verified FAITH-TRULY-OFF
